items.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
items.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.

items.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

items.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

items.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard

items.title: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
items.summary: India's smartphone slowdown highlights how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing and demand to corporate strategy.

items.title: Apple and Google ordered to purge ‘nudify’ apps from App Stores
items.summary: In letters sent to Apple and Google, San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu said that both companies have long been aware that they are hosting apps in violation of state law.

items.summary: The potential deal highlights a growing trend of complex, multi-stage funding rounds that mask true entry prices.

items.title: I replaced my space heater and ceiling fan with one Dyson appliance

items.title: FBI arrests man accused of using Steam games to drain victims’ crypto wallets
items.summary: Prosecutors accused 21-year-old student Zyaire Wilkins of publishing on Steam several fake video games that contained malware, infecting thousands of victims, and stealing crypto from some of them.

items.title: Amazon fixing bug that billed some AWS customers billions of dollars

items.summary: The recall comes as the top automotive safety regulator in the U.S. has warned AV companies about their vehicles interfering with first responders.

items.title: San Francisco mayor pushes for tougher rules after the Waymo traffic fiasco
